payload.title: Incremental replay: apply new events without re-replaying the whole log
payload.description: PREREQUISITE for a high-frequency realtime loop. Today every applied sync batch re-replays the entire log (local replayInto + PG replayWithinTx, full). Implement incremental apply: given the current cache + N new (ULID-ordered, tail-appended) events, apply just those. Detect the fast path (pure tail-append, src/pg/incremental.js isTailAppend/canonicalMax already exists) vs. the rare out-of-order insert that still needs a full replay. Both SQLite (replay.js) and PG (pg/replay.js) paths. This is SCP-143; without it the realtime loop's cost grows with board size.
